raw_text:

The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines. The fields are: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The user gave example data: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-56EEB5D0, blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it. Thus I must output exactly three lines, each line with a key=value as given.

The data: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-56EEB5D0, blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it.

Make sure each line starts with key= exactly.

Probably: route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-56EEB5D0
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

No extra whitespace or punctuation.

Thus final answer is three lines.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-56EEB5D0
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
